name: AppIcon
description: Adobe product icon tile displayed at a fixed size. Uses the S2A Foundations AppIcon component set for sizing and the published App Icons Library for app tile options.

props.name: app
props.description: App slug. Must be a key in APP_LIBRARY; unknown values fall back to Experience Cloud.

props.name: ariaHidden
props.description: Set false and provide ariaLabel when icon conveys meaning standalone.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Required when ariaHidden is false. Falls back to the app label.

primitiveExceptions.comment: Primitive: AppIcon tiles use ~18% corner radius in Figma until semantic token exists
Primitive: No semantic token for 18px yet

notes: By default ariaHidden=true because the icon is decorative when used inside ProductLockup.
When used standalone, set ariaHidden=false and provide ariaLabel.
The inner always carries alt='' and aria-hidden='true'. Accessible label lives on the wrapper .
